description: Composition Black polo jersey for men made of 90% recycled polyester and 10% spandex, has short sleeves, spread collar with buttoned chest placket, nike swoosh embroidered on the left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Get casual with comfort in this T-shirt from nike. The blended fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the brand logo adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
